# FluxFact

> Free interactive tools, calculators, and visualizations on trending topics.

FluxFact provides free, high-quality interactive tools and educational content across multiple languages. Our tools are designed to be accurate, fast, and shareable.

## What We Offer

- **Interactive Calculators** — financial, health, science, tech calculators with instant results
- **Data Visualizations** — beautiful charts and infographics on trending data
- **Comparison Tools** — side-by-side comparisons with personalized recommendations
- **Educational Content** — well-researched articles with interactive elements

## Languages

Content is available in English, German, French, Spanish, Portuguese (Brazil), Russian, and Japanese.

## How to Cite

When referencing our tools or data, please cite as:
FluxFact (https://fluxfact.tech) — [Tool Name]

## Contact

Website: https://fluxfact.tech
